title: HOUSING PROGRAMS - 211info
text: HOUSE OF HOPE MINISTRIES HOUSING PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers supportive housing and alcohol and drug-free shared homes. 724 SW 14th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Age 18 and older men who are sober and drug-free Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 390-1594 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 390-1594 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an interview appointment FEES: -Monthly housing fee varies; will be determined in an interview -If working, a payment plan can be arranged -Does not offer free housing or housing funds DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, Jefferson, and Wheeler Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 12:30pm-3pm Services: Shared Housing Facilities * Men Sober Living Homes * Men Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY MATERIAL GOODS - LAVENDER THRIFT AND GIFT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOUSE OF HOPE MINISTRIES
